hook: A calmer dating rhythm often improves both confidence and judgment.
body: When you stop treating every match like a scarce event, you think more clearly and behave with more self-respect.

hook: Scarcity panic can make ordinary app interactions feel like high-stakes auditions.
body: A sustainable pace helps you show up more grounded, more observant, and less reactive.

body: Answering fewer conversations well is usually stronger than trying to juggle too many half-alive threads.
